coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 65%, 90-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 65%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 65% for 5:00. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 5:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% complete. 17 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 41% done. 4 intervals left. 14 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 80%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 80% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 51% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 13 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 15 minutes in. 95% at 90-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 51% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 51% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 1:00. Then 12min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 1:00. Then 12min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 1:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 58% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0:30 at 115%. Then 2:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 58% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 58% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. 115% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 2:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 1 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5. 9min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% through. This is your workout. Own it. 150% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 5/6. 150% FTP × 10s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 20 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20 minutes of Z2 work. 85-90 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 5:00 at 55%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 55%, 85-90 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 83% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 25 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 83% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
